summary: Integration auditor session: ran cartography across repo (zero commit divergence, 349 dirty files from agent-system reorg), fixed 5 PG timestamp columns from integer→bigint across 4 schema files (Date.now() overflow prevention), verified CI Postgres already configured. Coordination query bug at coordination.ts:618 confirmed already fixed (inArray at line 789). 3 smoking guns reduced to 1 deferred (opencode.jsonc config drift). Two cross-session lessons recorded: Drizzle integer→bigint pattern and cartography drift on CI checks.
